snapshots.notes: The document lists 'Exchange traded certificates' (gold ETCs) under 'Debt securities', but they are classified as 'other' (commodities) based on the definition. 'Closed-ended investment funds' are 0.00% and included in 'other'.

extracted_from: Schedule of investments As at 31 July 2025 ... Trojan Fund (Ireland) ... Total equities ... 38.93% ... Total debt securities ... 60.77% ... Total exchange traded certificates ... 11.11%
extraction_notes: The percentages in parentheses (e.g., '2025: 30.88%') were ignored as the 'Fair value % of NAV' column explicitly provides the percentages for 'As at 31 July 2025'. 'Exchange traded certificates' (gold ETCs) were reclassified from 'Debt securities' to 'other'. The sum of percentages is 99.70%.
